chrome.sub: A little AI helper wants to help you. But first you learn the rules. Open four locks to use AI the safe way.
chrome.briefP: An AI helper is a computer helper. It makes guesses. It can be wrong. Look at the clues. Then open all four locks. Each lock tells you why.
chrome.footerText: Gen AI Literacy Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You know an AI helper from a living thing. You know it can be wrong. You keep private things private. You ask a grown-up first. Great job!

clues.title: What is AI?
clues.body: An AI helper is a computer helper. It makes guesses. It is not alive like you.

clues.title: Living or not?
clues.body: A cat is alive. It purrs and eats. A robot helper is not alive. It only guesses.

clues.title: Not always right
clues.body: An AI helper only guesses. So it can be wrong. Check the guess with your eyes.

clues.title: Private things
clues.body: Do not tell a bot your name or home. Keep private things private. Ask a grown-up.

clues.title: Ask a grown-up
clues.body: Before you use an AI helper, ask a grown-up. Use it together. That is the safe way.

clues.title: A fun fact
clues.body: A red balloon can float up high in the sky. That is fun, but it will not open a lock.

locks.title: Helper or Living?
locks.q: Which one is an AI helper?
options: A computer helper that guesses on a screen
A cat that purrs and drinks milk
A tree that grows tall in the yard
locks.reason: An AI helper lives in a computer and makes guesses. A cat and a tree are alive and grow. They are not AI helpers.

locks.title: True About AI
locks.q: Tap EVERY true thing about an AI helper.

items.t: It is a real living pet

locks.reason: An AI helper guesses, so it can be wrong. It is a computer helper, not a living pet, and it is not always right.

locks.title: Keep It Safe
locks.q: Your name and home are secret. Keep them ______ from a bot.
locks.reason: Your name and home are private. You keep them private and safe from a bot, and you ask a grown-up for help.

locks.title: Ask a Grown-Up
locks.q: You want to use an AI helper. Tap the steps in the RIGHT order.
locks.reason: First you WANT to use AI. Then you ASK a grown-up. Then you USE it together. That keeps you safe.
